title: ruehssia mollis
intro: Ruehssia mollis, also known as soft rue or Chinese rue, is a type of flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia, belonging to the family Apiaceae. Ruehssia mollis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and easing respiratory problems. Ruehssia mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use and preparation should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
